title: Terruja Addon
description: Multiplayer focused modpack with tons Quality of life features and ambience improvements
body:
# ![um boll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3a918c6efab1c7306a3214ba623aa56fefdeec0.png)
### **Bringing the two week phase to a whole other level**
**Focusing on making playing survival with friends much more enjoyable while trying to keep some of the vanilla feeling**
### Features
- 🎙️**Multiplayer additions** with [Simmple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) [Show Me Your Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) and [Emoji Type](https://modrinth.com/mod/emoji-type) and much more...
- 🗃️**New and Enhanced Menus** with [Better Stats](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) and [Screenshot Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-viewer)
- ✨**Visual and Sound improvements for every system in the game** with [ExtraSounds Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrasoundsforge) [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects) [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) and much more...
- 🖼️**Expanded Render distance** with [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) and [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- 🍔**Performance improvements** with [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) and much more...
- 🎈**Qol** [Low Durability Switcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/low-durability-switcher) [Idwtialsimmoedm](https://modrinth.com/mod/idwtialsimmoedm) [Shulker Box Tooltip ](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) and much more...
